summary: Added repo-root narada.ps1 with an agent-start command matching the working User Site invocation shape. Start-NaradaArchitect.ps1 now delegates through .\narada.ps1 agent-start -Agent narada.architect -Runtime codex -Exec. Dry-run and shortcut no-launch verification passed.
residuals: The preferred manual launch command is now .\narada.ps1 agent-start -Agent narada.architect -Runtime codex -Exec. Exact Codex resume binding remains separate.
